programme.title: Pack Mentality

programme.title: Magic Bullet

programme.title: The Tell

programme.title: Heart Monitor
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with ways for Scott to control the transformation in order to be with Allison (Crystal Reed), while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) attempts to make an ally of Scott in his battle with the hunters.

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: When Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) is savagely attacked by the Alpha, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and their friends find themselves trapped in Beacon Hills High School at night where they face both questions and suspicions about each other.

programme.title: Lunatic
programme.desc: With Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) on the run from Sheriff Stilinski (Linden Ashby), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) must help Scott (Tyler Posey) face his second full moon. Meanwhile, Jackson (Colton Haynes) tries to get closer to Allison (Crystal Reed).

programme.title: Wolf's Bane
programme.desc: Clues, including a prior encounter with Derek (Tyler Hoechlin), bring Jackson (Colton Haynes) to a dangerous revelation about Scott (Tyler Posey)…and his actions begin to threaten not only Scott's life, but his own as well.

programme.title: Co-Captain
programme.desc: With startling revelations weighing in on him, Scott (Tyler Posey) finds himself scrambling to protect the people he loves, including Allison (Crystal Reed) who begins to follow clues left by her Aunt Kate about her family history.

programme.title: Seeds Of Destruction

programme.title: Simon Says

programme.title: Stasis
programme.desc: Due to dwindling resources in the future, the world consists of "Alphas" and "Betas" who are alternately put in stasis for 72 hour periods, all in service to the "Elites," who lord over the Alphas and the Betas...But a resistance is coming.

programme.title: Down To Earth

programme.title: Inner Child

programme.title: Glitch

programme.title: The Price of Winning
programme.desc: The 1987 Edmonton Oilers entered the Stanley Cup Finals as the greatest hockey team ever, boasting 7 future Hall of Famers and two Stanley Cups under their belt. The Philadelphia Flyers, on the other hand, entered the series with a rookie goalie as their only hope, playing like they had nothing to lose. What resulted from this matchup was one of the most iconic Game 7s in hockey history.

programme.title: Deep Into the Night
programme.desc: The moment the Yankees beat the Red Sox in the 2003 ALCS, the greatest rivalry in sports reaches its zenith, with the Bombers dynasty looking as indominable and inevitable as ever, and a rising Red Sox club turned aside. And in the middle of it all is Aaron Boone – a midseason addition to the Yanks from a baseball family – a truly unlikely hero.

programme.title: Next Year
programme.desc: It had been 108 years since the Chicago Cubs had last won the World Series. And now, after trailing 3-1 in the series, the Cubs were one game away from ending the drought. But against the Cleveland Indians – a franchise with their own long title drought – it would take everything the Cubs had and more to win Game 7 of the 2016 World Series.

programme.title: The Messiah Promised
programme.desc: After winning five Stanley Cups with the greatest dynasty in the history of modern hockey, Mark Messier risked his legacy to accomplish the impossible: winning in New York City.

programme.desc: Polita escucha q Victoria y Arriaga esperan bebe y espera a Liliana para contarle. Festejan a Paula pero lamentablemente ella no resiste. Aníbal y candelaria se casaron. Adriana y Beatriz viven en el condo de Victoria.

programme.title: Al borde de la muerte
programme.desc: Liliana insulta a su padre. Santino regresa de Brasil. Santino, Arriaga y Guzmán crean una agencia de seguridad. Espanto ataca a Liliana. Vicente la está operando. Adriana comienza su parto.

programme.title: Reencuentro de amor
programme.desc: Vicente y Adriana se encuentran y se cuentan las fechorías de Aníbal. Nelson pide perdón a Guzmán. Adriana le reclama a Aníbal. Nikki le avisa a Roy sobre Lili. Carlos regresa y Adriana le miente.

programme.title: Verdadera hija
programme.desc: Liliana despierta y quiere casarse con Guzmán. Kendra trata de seducir a Aníbal. Candelaria le dice a Adriana toda la verdad.

programme.title: Sueño por cumplir
programme.desc: Salcero sospecha quienes atacaron a Lili. Espanto no delata a Kendra. Ella tiene planes siniestros. Carlos le reclama a Adriana. Vicente ofrece casarse con Adriana y ser el padre. Adriana le cuenta las buenas noticias a Vicente.

programme.title: Dos padres
programme.desc: Lili es operada nuevamente por hemorragia interna. Carlos quiere estar con Adriana pero ella lo rechaza. Vicente besa a Lili y Arriaga lo ve.

programme.title: Boda gay
programme.desc: Lily mejora y le pide perdón a Arriaga y a Victoria. Stefano y Jean Marie se van a casar y Odette apoya a su hijo. Lily le desea felicidad a Guzmán y Nikki y terminan amigos. Aníbal hace negocios cochinos.

programme.title: Dolor de padre
programme.desc: Día de boda de candelaria y Aníbal. Nelson no invitado llega con un regalo de bodas. Todas las verdades salen. Salcero quiere confesar sus delitos. Arriaga sale de la iglesia y sufre un shock.

programme.title: La advertencia de Salsero
programme.desc: Guzmán y Nikki encuentran a Arriaga. Arriaga no puede ver. Aníbal escapa en un jet. Candelaria se entrega a la ley. Salcero se confiesa con Arriaga. Kendra infecta a Nelson.

programme.title: Gran final: Part 1
programme.desc: Nelson sufre un accidente mortal. Aníbal llega a NY. Kendra va al velorio. Nelson deja sus acciones A Victoria. Nace su hijo y Arriaga recupera la vista. Aníbal en peligro de muerte. Salcero, Guzmán y Arriaga planean atrapar a Kendra.

programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: El día de la boda
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Cumplemes
programme.desc: Vanesa olvida el cumplememes de Fabián y sus amigos le ayudan a preparar una sorpresa. Un alumno de Silvia le confiesa que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Tu nueva mamá
programme.desc: El padre de Lorena regresa con la noticia de que se casó con su enfermera. El Borre y Virginia sacan su app para vender tacos.

programme.title: A lo chino
programme.desc: Los López Pérez tienen un adeudo de agua y Luis les decomisa su televisión. Germán se enamora de Meche, la nueva nana de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: ¿Dónde está Rambo?
programme.desc: Pedro ha extraviado a Rambo y se deprime. La suegra de Alejandra quiere llevar a los López Pérez de vacaciones.

programme.title: Mollejitas 'Mi flaquita'
programme.desc: Arturo tiene la idea de poner un puesto callejero de comida. Pedro y Cris aplican técnicas de feng shui en el departamento para las buenas energías.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La ex de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko tiene contacto con una exnovia y Alejandra se pone celosa. Los Rivers llevan a Luisito Jr. a algunos cástines.

programme.title: Tomasa
programme.desc: Luis compra un dispositivo inteligente para controlar el departamento y lo presume con los Vecinos. Los López Pérez rifan un extraño cuadro.

programme.title: La cruda
programme.desc: Rocko y Alejandra bebieron demasiado la noche anterior y no recuerdan nada de lo que pasó, Rocko fue arrestado por el robo de artículos para bebes y Luisito Jr. dio sus primeros pasos impresionando a sus padres de la nueva etapa que comienza.

programme.title: Prueba de embarazo
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que está embarazada, ¿cómo lo tomará la familia? Chris y su pareja han decidido adoptar a un bebé.

programme.title: Melena de Luis
programme.desc: Luis debe recurrir a remedios extremos para poder continuar con su labor de venta. Rocco está dispuesto a fugarse de la prisión.

programme.title: Foto familiar
programme.desc: El abuelo de Benito llega al edificio para tomarse la foto familiar. Germán encuentra a un equipo de niños con quien hacer la reta de fútbol.

programme.title: Abarrotes Don Arturo
programme.desc: Morris tiene la tarea de vender unos chocolates de la escuela y a su familia se les ocurre una idea. Lorena manda a arreglar la máquina de escribir de Frankie.

programme.title: Tapa calefactora
programme.desc: Germán intentará instalar una nueva tapa calefactora en el inodoro de don Hipólito. Mientras que, Vanessa probará un remedio contra las canas.

programme.title: Regalo perfecto
programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: Is it bad to complain? Joyce Meyer sheds light on what God's Word says about it and provides practical strategies for living a grateful, holy life.

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don't have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don't let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what's in your way.

programme.title: Embrace Your Place
programme.desc: What if where you are right now is exactly where God wants you? He hasn't overlooked you; He's set you apart. Learn how to stop comparing your position to someone else's platform and start embracing the purpose God has for your life.

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we're going through a season that's uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn't choosing what's easiest, it's choosing what's worth it. If you're tempted to quit because it's hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something.

programme.title: You And Your Big Shrunken Head
programme.desc: When Oliver returns home with Arnold, the citizens in town hold a large reception for Arnold. But when Oliver receives a phone call from a lawyer representing an eccentric relative of the Birnbachers, the riches go into question.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: Oliver is mad over the town's dirt road, especially when he finds out that the state set aside money over thirty years ago to fix it. Oliver goes to the Capitol to get the road paved but hits a roadblock when the Ziffels' house must be torn down.

programme.title: The Four Of Spades
programme.desc: Lisa foretells of a mysterious stranger that will appear into Oliver's life. Enter Tadpole Talbot, Eb's childhood friend who has become a singing sensation. Tadpole has convinced Eb to go out on the road with him and join his band as a roadie.

programme.title: The Youth Center
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Oliver's School Girl Crush
programme.desc: Oliver is asked to speak at the local high school about his illustrious law career and makes quite an impression on student Kathy Baxter. Oliver must contend with Kathy's fawning as well as her jealous boyfriend is not very happy with Oliver.

programme.title: Ralph's Nuptials
programme.desc: Hank Kimball proposes marriage to lady carpenter Ralph Monroe while under the influence of heavy medication. Lisa plans an amazing country wedding only to find out that, Sam, the Justice of the Peace, has forgotten to new his license.

programme.title: Oliver And The Cornstalk
programme.desc: Oliver plants his crops, worrying that they haven't been planted in time for a harvest. Lisa tries to be helpful and mixes up a batch of sour lemonade. Oliver pours out the bitter elixir in the newly planted field, with an unimaginable consequence.

programme.title: Beauty Is Skin Deep
programme.desc: Sam Drucker does not stock any cosmetics in his store, much to the chagrin of Lisa. Lisa decides to set up a "small" display in the store. When the merchandise is delivered, it forces Mr. Drucker to retreat to the front porch.

programme.title: The Wishbook
programme.desc: Mr. Haney discovers an old wish book dating back to 1898 that tells the story of Calvin and Tessie Whittaker who once owned the Douglases' farm and how Calvin traveled to Hollywood to pitch his idea of putting a mouse named Dickey into films.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: Bundle Of Joy
programme.desc: Oliver goes to New York to finish up a case at his old firm. Meanwhile back on the farm, Lisa and Eb find a puppy left on the doorstep. Lisa, in all her innocence, leads Oliver to believe the puppy, affectionally named Freddie, is a human baby.

programme.title: The Ex-Con
programme.desc: Oliver has been invited to give a speech at the Bar Association. He is there to advocate for the hiring of ex-convicts. He eventually ends up regretting his speech when he is forced to hire an ex-convict by the name of Willie Dunhill.

programme.title: The Cow Killer
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: The Confrontation
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: The Case Of The Hooterville Refund Fraud
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: The Picnic
programme.desc: Oliver is insistent that he and Lisa have a romantic Sunday afternoon picnic, all alone. His romantic gesture for two turns into a picnic for the entire town. Finally, Oliver finds them a romantic refuge in a most unlikely place.

programme.title: The Beeping Rock
programme.desc: Local boy Dinky Watson has one heck of a story to tell anyone who will listen. When Dinky convinces Lisa to buy a "moon rock" for the considerable sum of $14, Oliver suspects that she is the victim of a practical joke.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: Halloween, Addams Style
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: Morticia, The Writer
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: Morticia, The Sculptress
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Gomez, The Reluctant Lover
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: Feud In The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney, to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: Gomez, The Cat Burglar
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: Portrait Of Gomez
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Morticia's Dilemma
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter, Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: Christmas With The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fill in for him.

programme.title: Uncle Fester, Tycoon
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: Morticia & Gomez Vs. Fester & Grandmama
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: Fester Goes On A Diet
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.
